Do 15 pushups immediately.
Sing the chorus of a song chosen by the group loudly.
Do a plank for 30 Seconds.
Eat a spoonful of a condiment chosen by the group.
Do a silly dance for 30 Seconds without music.
Speak in a fake accent for the next 3 rounds.
Let someone draw a mustache on your face with a marker.
Hold an ice cube in your hand until it melts.
Let the group mix a 'mystery drink' (safe items) for you to take a sip of.
Do 30 squats.
Let the person to your left style your hair however they want.
Bark like a dog every time someone says your name for the next 30 Seconds.
Walk like a crab across the room and back.
Spin around 15 times and try to walk straight for 10 meters.
Let the group ask you 3 personal questions you must answer truthfully.
Act like a chicken for 30 Seconds.
Do 25 jumping jacks.
Stand on one leg for 30 Seconds.
Let the group give you a new nickname and you must answer to it for the rest of the game.
Talk in a high-pitched voice for the next 2 rounds.
Talk in a deep voice for the next 2 rounds.
Don't blink for 30 Seconds.
Let someone write a funny word on your forehead.
Crawl across the room on all fours while meowing.
Try to do a handstand against the wall for 20 Seconds.
Smell the shoe of the person to your right and describe it.
Act like a monkey for 30 Seconds.
Do the worm dance move across the floor.
Sing everything you say for the next 2 rounds.
Whisper everything you say for the next 2 rounds.
Shout everything you say for the next 2 rounds.
Walk backwards only for the next 3 rounds.
Do 15 burpees.
Hold a wall sit for 30 Seconds.
Try to lick your elbow.
Touch your toes and hold for 30 Seconds.
Balance a spoon on your nose for 30 Seconds.
Cross your eyes for 15 Seconds.
Make the funniest face you can and hold it until your next turn.
Act like a crying baby for 30 Seconds.
Pretend to be a waiter/waitress and take orders from everyone.
Let the group pose you like a statue and stay still for 30 Seconds.
Don't use your hands for anything during the next round.
Drink a glass of water without using your hands.
Eat a snack without using your hands.
Smell everyone's breath and rate it from 1 to 10.
Do an impression of another player until someone guesses who it is.
Do an impression of a famous celebrity until someone guesses who it is.
Act like a cat and meow at everyone for 30 Seconds.
Moo like a cow at random intervals for the next 30 Seconds.
Pretend to be a dog and fetch an object thrown by someone.
Wear your socks on your hands for the next 2 rounds.
Wear your shirt inside out for the rest of the game.
Wear your shoes on the wrong feet for the next 3 rounds.
Let someone mess up your hair completely.
Keep your eyes closed for the next 2 rounds.
Speak in rhymes for the next 30 Seconds.
Don't say 'yes' or 'no' for the next 2 rounds.
Don't show your teeth when laughing for the rest of the game.
Laugh continuously for 30 Seconds.
Have a staring contest with the person to your right.
Let the group decide a custom (friendly) punishment for you.
Reveal a secret you haven't told anyone here.
Tell an embarrassing story from your childhood.
Say something nice about everyone in the room.
Run in place for 30 Seconds.
Pretend to swim on the floor for 30 Seconds.
Act like a fish out of water for 30 Seconds.
Pretend to be a T-Rex for the next 2 rounds.
Roar at everyone like a lion.
Hiss like a snake at anyone who talks to you for the next round.
Slither on the floor like a snake.
Hop like a bunny around the room.
Jump like a frog across the room.
Gallop like a horse around the room.
Pretend to ride a horse.
Pretend to be a car and make engine noises for 30 Seconds.
Act like a traffic cop and direct people in the room.
Salute everyone who speaks to you for the next round.
Bow to everyone who speaks to you for the next round.
Speak like a robot for the next 2 rounds.
Attempt the moonwalk.
Do the Macarena dance for 30 Seconds.
Do the Chicken Dance for 30 Seconds.
Yodel loudly for 30 Seconds.
Rap about the person to your right for 30 Seconds.
Beatbox for 30 Seconds.
Play an air guitar solo for 30 Seconds.
Play air drums for 30 Seconds.
Pretend to be an opera singer and sing a sentence.
Sing a nursery rhyme dramatically.
Make up a short poem about the game.
Tell a joke. If no one laughs, do 15 pushups.
Try to make everyone laugh. If you fail, drink a glass of water.
Keep a straight face while everyone tries to make you laugh for 30 Seconds.
Sit in a corner for 30 Seconds.
Stand in a corner facing the wall for 30 Seconds.
Wear a funny hat (or object as a hat) for the next 2 rounds.
Walk with a book on your head across the room without dropping it.
Balance a shoe on your head for 30 Seconds.
Try to juggle 3 items for 30 Seconds.
Throw and catch a grape/snack in your mouth 3 times in a row.
Eat a lemon slice without making a face.
Drink a glass of water quickly (under 10 seconds).
Gargle water and try to sing a song.
Hold water in your mouth for 30 Seconds without swallowing or spitting.
Let someone make you a turban with a towel.
Tie your shoelaces together for 1 round.
Walk on your knees for the next 2 turns.
Roll across the room.
Hide and let others find you (you have 20 seconds to hide).
Mime an action for others to guess (3 different actions).
Let someone draw on your back and guess what it is.
Pretend the floor is lava for the next 2 rounds.
Stand on a chair and declare your love for a random object.
Give a 30 Seconds speech about why potatoes are superior to all other vegetables.
Give a speech about why you should be the leader of the group.
Apologize to everyone in the room for your 'crimes'.
Describe everyone in the room as a type of fruit.
Assign an animal to everyone and explain why.

Act like a paparazzi photographer and take 'photos' of everyone.

Howl at the moon for 30 Seconds.
Pretend to be a superhero and explain your origin story.
Say the alphabet backwards in under 30 seconds.
Count to 100 as fast as you can.
Say a tongue twister 10 times fast.
Speak without moving your lips for 30 Seconds.
Talk like a pirate for the next 2 rounds.
Talk like a baby for the next 2 rounds.
Talk like an alien from outer space.
Let someone check your pockets (no phone/wallet).
Show the most recent photo in your gallery (non-private).
Let the group choose a YouTube video you have to watch in silence.

Hold a handstand against the wall for as long as you can.
